title: Features
meta_description: Discover the powerful features of Static Website Generator. Build fast, secure and SEO-friendly websites using JSON content and Astro themes.
og_description: Build lightning-fast static websites using JSON content, reusable Astro themes and a modern publishing workflow.
excerpt: Everything you need to build, manage and deploy modern static websites.
content:
# Features

Static Website Generator (SWG) is designed for developers, agencies and content teams that want the speed of static websites without sacrificing a modern editing experience.

## JSON as the Single Source of Truth

Every page, blog post, documentation article and menu is stored as JSON. This makes your content portable, versionable and easy to automate.

## Astro Theme Support

Themes are standard Astro projects. Import existing themes, customize them locally and reuse them across multiple websites.

## Markdown Editor

Write content in Markdown while SWG manages metadata, publishing and exports automatically.

## One Click Build

Export your content, build your Astro project and publish a complete static website with a predictable workflow.

## SEO Ready

Generate clean HTML, structured metadata and search engine friendly pages with excellent Core Web Vitals.

## Built for Developers

SWG follows a simple architecture where the CMS writes JSON and Astro renders the website. No runtime CMS, no unnecessary complexity.

```text
CMS
    ↓
JSON
    ↓
Astro
    ↓
Static HTML
```

Start building modern static websites today with SWG.
